im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/entity.general_idea: Removed the password field from the user data entity.
Renamed userSex to gender and updated the corresponding database column mapping.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/entity.human_impl: Changed @TableField(value = "user_sex") private Integer userSex; to @TableField(value = "gender") private Integer gender;

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/entity.general_idea: Renamed birthDay to birthday and updated the corresponding database column mapping.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/entity.human_impl: Changed @TableField(value = "birth_day") private String birthDay; to @TableField(value = "birthday") private String birthday;

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/securi.general_idea: Changed the authentication type constant for QR code login from 'qrcode' to 'scan'.
